title: SKILL.md frontmatter (agentskills.io)
description: YAML frontmatter of a SKILL.md following the agentskills.io open standard (https://agentskills.io/specification). Claude Code extension fields are additionally permitted.

name.description: Skill identifier. 1-64 chars, lowercase a-z / 0-9 / hyphens, no leading/trailing or consecutive hyphens. MUST match the parent directory name.

description.description: What the skill does AND when to use it. Include keywords that help agents identify relevant tasks.

license.description: License name or reference to a bundled license file.

compatibility.description: Environment requirements (intended product, system packages, network access, etc.).

metadata.description: Arbitrary string key-value mapping for additional metadata (e.g. author, version).

allowed-tools.description: Experimental. Space-separated string of pre-approved tools (e.g. "Bash(git:*) Read").

disable-model-invocation.description: Claude Code extension: if true, invoked only explicitly via /<name>, not auto-selected by the model.

argument-hint.description: Claude Code extension: hint shown for arguments to the skill.
